records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab monotherapy in PD-L1 ≥50%
records.sourceExcerptShort: PD-L1 ≥50% -> pembrolizumab is a standard first-line option [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Atezolizumab monotherapy in PD-L1-high
records.sourceExcerptShort: Alternatives for PD-L1 ≥50% include atezolizumab (also if ICs ≥10%) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, high PD-L1; note IC ≥10% criterion for atezolizumab in guideline text.

records.topicTitle: Cemiplimab monotherapy in PD-L1 ≥50%
records.sourceExcerptShort: Alternatives for PD-L1 ≥50% include cemiplimab [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Chemo-immunotherapy preferred regardless of PD-L1
records.sourceExcerptShort: Combinations of platinum-based ChT and anti-PD-(L)1 inhibitors are preferred to platinum-based ChT [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy; applies regardless of PD-L1 status.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab + ipilimumab option for PD-L1 ≥1%
records.sourceExcerptShort: Nivolumab+ipilimumab is an option for PD-L1 ≥1% tumours regardless of histology [I, A] (FDA not EMA).
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, PD-L1 ≥1%, no contraindication for immunotherapy; regulatory status varies.

records.topicTitle: Monotherapy ICI not recommended for PD-L1 <50%
records.sourceExcerptShort: Monotherapy ICI is not recommended for tumours with PD-L1 <50% [I, D].
records.applicabilityNotes: Use chemo-immunotherapy combinations instead when eligible.

records.topicTitle: Platinum-doublet chemotherapy for PS 2
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-based (preferably carboplatin) doublets should be considered in eligible patients with PS 2 [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 2; histology-specific agent selection per guideline.

records.topicTitle: Single-agent chemotherapy as alternative for PS 2
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT is an alternative option for PS 2 patients [II, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 2; pemetrexed restricted to non-squamous histology.

records.topicTitle: Best supportive care for PS 3-4
records.sourceExcerptShort: Patients with PS 3-4 should be offered best supportive care [III, A].

records.topicTitle: Second-line PD-(L)1 inhibitor after platinum-doublet chemotherapy
records.sourceExcerptShort: PD-(L)1 inhibitors (nivolumab, pembrolizumab, atezolizumab) are treatment of choice for most patients after first-line platinum-doublet ChT [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Previously treated with platinum-doublet; pembrolizumab requires PD-L1 ≥1% in guideline text.

records.topicTitle: Cemiplimab + platinum-doublet chemotherapy
records.sourceExcerptShort: Cemiplimab-platinum-doublet ChT is an option regardless of histology [I, A; FDA approved, not EMA approved].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy; pemetrexed maintenance for non-squamous histology per regimen.

records.topicTitle: Durvalumab + tremelimumab + platinum-doublet chemotherapy
records.sourceExcerptShort: Durvalumab-tremelimumab-platinum-doublet ChT is an option regardless of histology [I, A; FDA approved, not EMA approved].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab + ipilimumab (PD-L1 ≥1%)
records.sourceExcerptShort: Nivolumab-ipilimumab is an option for PD-L1 ≥1% tumours regardless of histology [I, A; FDA approved, not EMA approved].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: For PD-L1 ≥50% needing rapid tumour reduction: choose chemo-ICI or nivo+ipi+2c ChT
records.sourceExcerptShort: ChT+ICI or nivolumab-ipilimumab with two cycles of ChT instead of monotherapy anti-PD-(L)1 is an option for PD-L1 ≥50% with need for fast tumour load reduction [IV, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, PD-L1 ≥50%, no contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Monotherapy immune checkpoint inhibitor is not recommended when PD-L1 <50%
records.sourceExcerptShort: Monotherapy ICI is not recommended for tumours with PD-L1 expression <50% [I, D].
records.applicabilityNotes: Applies to PS 0-1 patients without contraindication to immunotherapy; for combination options use chemo-ICI topics.

records.topicTitle: PS 2: consider platinum-based (preferably carboplatin) doublet chemotherapy
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-based (preferably carboplatin) doublets should be considered in eligible patients with PS 2 [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: ECOG PS 2; eligibility and toxicity discussion required.

records.topicTitle: PS 2: single-agent chemotherapy options (gemcitabine, vinorelbine, docetaxel)
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT with gemcitabine, vinorelbine, docetaxel is an alternative option for PS 2 [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: ECOG PS 2; use when not eligible for platinum doublet or when toxicity concerns dominate.

records.topicTitle: PS 2 non-squamous: pemetrexed single-agent chemotherapy option
records.sourceExcerptShort: Pemetrexed (restricted to non-squamous) is an alternative single-agent option for PS 2 [II, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: ECOG PS 2; non-squamous histology.

records.topicTitle: PS 2: monotherapy ICI may be considered (limited data)
records.sourceExcerptShort: Insufficient data are available on monotherapy ICI for PS 2, but this option can be considered [III, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: ECOG PS 2; prefer chemo approaches when eligible; consider PD-L1 and comorbidities.

records.topicTitle: PS 3-4: best supportive care

biomarkerLogic.notes: Performance status driven; biomarkers not used for matching.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Patients with PS 3-4 should be offered BSC [III, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: ECOG PS 3-4.

records.topicTitle: Second-line: offer systemic therapy if PS 0-2 and no major comorbidities
records.sourceExcerptShort: Second-line treatment should be offered to patients without major comorbidities and PS 0-2; depends on first-line agents used [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: After progression on first-line systemic therapy in metastatic NSCLC when ECOG PS 0-2 and no major comorbidities; includes patients treated with ICI-based regimens and those treated with chemo-only because immunotherapy was contraindicated. Use regimen-specific options below.

records.topicTitle: Second-line: docetaxel
records.sourceExcerptShort: Other options include docetaxel [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Second-line after progression on first-line systemic therapy (ICI-based or chemo-only when immunotherapy is contraindicated); ECOG PS 0-2.

records.topicTitle: Second-line: ramucirumab + docetaxel
records.sourceExcerptShort: Other options include ramucirumab-docetaxel [I, B; MCBS 1].
records.applicabilityNotes: Second-line after progression on first-line systemic therapy (ICI-based or chemo-only when immunotherapy is contraindicated); ECOG PS 0-2; consider bleeding risk and comorbidities.

records.topicTitle: Second-line: consider anti-PD-(L)1 rechallenge after prior clinical benefit and discontinuation not due to PD/toxicity
records.sourceExcerptShort: If substantial clinical benefit from (ChT)+ICI and ICI discontinued previously not for PD or severe toxicity, rechallenge may be considered [III, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Use only when prior ICI was stopped for reasons other than progression or severe toxicity; PS 0-2.

records.topicTitle: Atezolizumab + bevacizumab + carboplatin + paclitaxel (ABCP) in non-squamous, EGFR/ALK WT
records.sourceExcerptShort: In non-squamous NSCLC with negative molecular tests, atezolizumab + bevacizumab + carboplatin + paclitaxel is a first-line option [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous; EGFR/ALK wild type; PS 0-1; no contraindication to immunotherapy or bevacizumab.

records.topicTitle: Continuation maintenance pemetrexed after platinum + pemetrexed induction
records.sourceExcerptShort: Continuation maintenance pemetrexed after response/stable disease on platinum doublet is recommended in eligible non-squamous NSCLC [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Non-squamous; after induction platinum+pemetrexed; consider toxicity, PS, patient preference. (Maintenance phase of first-line: continuation maintenance.)

records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab + carboplatin + (nab)-paclitaxel then pembrolizumab maintenance in SqCC
records.sourceExcerptShort: For metastatic SqCC without contraindication to immunotherapy, pembrolizumab + carboplatin + (nab)-paclitaxel followed by pembrolizumab maintenance is a standard option [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: SqCC; PS 0-1; any PD-L1.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab + ipilimumab + 2 cycles platinum-doublet then nivolumab + ipilimumab in SqCC
records.sourceExcerptShort: Nivolumab + ipilimumab with 2 cycles of platinum-doublet chemotherapy followed by nivolumab + ipilimumab is a first-line option [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: SqCC; PS 0-1; any PD-L1; no contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Cemiplimab + platinum-doublet chemotherapy then cemiplimab maintenance in SqCC
records.sourceExcerptShort: Cemiplimab plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy followed by cemiplimab is a first-line option (regional regulatory status may vary).
records.applicabilityNotes: SqCC; PS 0-1; any PD-L1; ensure local approval/availability.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS0-1): platinum-doublet + gemcitabine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (combined with gemcitabine) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 0-1; contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS0-1): platinum-doublet + vinorelbine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (combined with vinorelbine) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 0-1; contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS0-1): platinum-doublet + taxane
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (combined with a taxane) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 0-1; contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS0-1): gemcitabine maintenance after gemcitabine-cisplatin
records.sourceExcerptShort: If 4 cycles of gemcitabine–cisplatin: gemcitabine maintenance [I, C].
records.applicabilityNotes: Continuation maintenance option after 4 cycles of gemcitabine–cisplatin in SqCC with contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS2): platinum-doublet + gemcitabine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (combined with gemcitabine) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS2): platinum-doublet + vinorelbine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (combined with vinorelbine) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS2): platinum-doublet + taxane
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (combined with a taxane) [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS2): single-agent gemcitabine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (gemcitabine) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS2): single-agent vinorelbine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (vinorelbine) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS2): single-agent docetaxel
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (docetaxel) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (SqCC, PS0-2): afatinib after progression (selected cases)
records.sourceExcerptShort: Afatinib [I, C].
records.applicabilityNotes: Guideline notes afatinib as an option in selected cases (e.g., unknown EGFR status or EGFR-wildtype) after progression.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS0-1): platinum-doublet with pemetrexed preferred
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT [I, A] (pemetrexed preferred) [II, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 0-1; contraindication to immunotherapy; molecular tests negative.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS0-1): continuation pemetrexed maintenance
records.sourceExcerptShort: Followed by continuation pemetrexed maintenance [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Continuation maintenance after platinum+pemetrexed induction in non-squamous NSCLC when immunotherapy is contraindicated.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS0-1): switch maintenance pemetrexed
records.sourceExcerptShort: Switch maintenance pemetrexed [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Switch maintenance pemetrexed option when induction regimen did not include pemetrexed, per algorithm.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS0-1): gemcitabine maintenance after gemcitabine-cisplatin
records.sourceExcerptShort: If 4 cycles of gemcitabine–cisplatin: continuation maintenance [I, C].
records.applicabilityNotes: Continuation maintenance option after 4 cycles of gemcitabine–cisplatin in non-squamous NSCLC when immunotherapy is contraindicated.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS0-1): carboplatin + paclitaxel + bevacizumab then bevacizumab maintenance
records.sourceExcerptShort: Carboplatin–paclitaxel–bevacizumab followed by bevacizumab maintenance [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Non-squamous NSCLC; consider when bevacizumab appropriate; immunotherapy contraindicated; molecular tests negative.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS0-1): platinum + pemetrexed + bevacizumab then pemetrexed + bevacizumab maintenance
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum–pemetrexed–bevacizumab followed by pemetrexed–bevacizumab maintenance [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Non-squamous NSCLC; bevacizumab-eligible; immunotherapy contraindicated; molecular tests negative.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS2): platinum-doublet (carboplatin preferred) with pemetrexed preferred
records.sourceExcerptShort: Platinum-doublet ChT (carboplatin preferred) [I, A; pemetrexed preferred: II, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC; ECOG PS 2; contraindication to immunotherapy; molecular tests negative.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS2): pemetrexed maintenance if PS improves
records.sourceExcerptShort: Maintenance pemetrexed if improvement to PS 0-1 [MCBS 4].
records.applicabilityNotes: Algorithm suggests pemetrexed maintenance if PS improves to 0-1 after induction; immunotherapy contraindicated.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS2): single-agent pemetrexed
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (pemetrexed) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS2 non-squamous NSCLC; immunotherapy contraindicated; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS2): single-agent gemcitabine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (gemcitabine) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS2 non-squamous NSCLC; immunotherapy contraindicated; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS2): single-agent vinorelbine
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (vinorelbine) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS2 non-squamous NSCLC; immunotherapy contraindicated; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: Contraindication to immunotherapy (non-squamous, PS2): single-agent docetaxel
records.sourceExcerptShort: Single-agent ChT (docetaxel) [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS2 non-squamous NSCLC; immunotherapy contraindicated; consider if platinum doublet not suitable.

records.topicTitle: First-line ALK TKI: alectinib, brigatinib or lorlatinib
records.sourceExcerptShort: Patients should be treated first-line with alectinib, brigatinib or lorlatinib [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: ALK translocation positive.

records.topicTitle: BRAF V600: dabrafenib + trametinib
records.sourceExcerptShort: BRAFi–MEK inhibition using dabrafenib–trametinib is recommended [III, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: BRAF V600 mutation (trial enrolled V600E).

records.topicTitle: Osimertinib first-line for classical activating EGFR mutation
records.sourceExcerptShort: Osimertinib is the preferable first-line option for classical activating EGFR mutation [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: EGFR exon 19 deletion or exon 21 L858R; especially relevant for CNS metastases.

records.topicTitle: Other first-line EGFR TKIs when osimertinib unavailable
records.sourceExcerptShort: Erlotinib, gefitinib, afatinib, dacomitinib are other first-line single-agent options [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Use when osimertinib not available/appropriate.

records.topicTitle: Second-line osimertinib for T790M-positive resistance
records.sourceExcerptShort: T790M-positive resistance should receive osimertinib as second-line therapy [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: Progression on first/second-generation EGFR TKI with confirmed T790M.

records.topicTitle: HER2 mutation: trastuzumab deruxtecan if available after prior therapy
records.sourceExcerptShort: In HER2 exon 20 mutations, trastuzumab deruxtecan, if available, is recommended following prior therapy (not EMA approved) [III, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: HER2 mutation; regulatory availability varies.

records.topicTitle: MET exon 14 skipping: capmatinib or tepotinib
records.sourceExcerptShort: Capmatinib and tepotinib are recommended in MET exon 14 skipping mutation (second line per EMA label) [III, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: MET exon 14 skipping; often after prior immunotherapy and/or platinum-based chemotherapy per EMA label.

records.topicTitle: NTRK fusion: larotrectinib or entrectinib when no satisfactory alternatives
records.sourceExcerptShort: Larotrectinib and entrectinib are recommended for NSCLC with NTRK gene fusion with no satisfactory treatment options [III, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: NTRK fusion positive; used when no satisfactory alternative treatments.

records.topicTitle: RET fusion: selpercatinib or pralsetinib first-line
records.sourceExcerptShort: Treatment with selpercatinib or pralsetinib is recommended as first-line therapy [III, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: RET fusion positive.

records.topicTitle: First-line ROS1 TKI: crizotinib or entrectinib
records.sourceExcerptShort: Crizotinib or entrectinib is recommended first-line [III, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: ROS1 translocation positive; entrectinib preferred with brain metastases (guideline text).

records.topicTitle: EGFR exon 20 insertion: amivantamab after platinum-doublet
records.sourceExcerptShort: Amivantamab is approved for tumours progressing on platinum-doublet ChT and can be recommended [III, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: EGFR exon 20 insertion; progression after platinum-doublet.

records.topicTitle: KRAS G12C: sotorasib after prior therapy
records.sourceExcerptShort: Sotorasib is recommended for KRAS G12C-mutated NSCLC failing prior therapy [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: KRAS G12C mutation; after prior platinum and ICI per trial context.

records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab + platinum + pemetrexed (KEYNOTE-189)
records.sourceExcerptShort: First-line combination treatment regardless of PD-L1: platinum-based chemotherapy plus PD-1/PD-L1 blockade is the most common approach.
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy; non-squamous histology; pemetrexed maintenance per regimen.

records.topicTitle: Atezolizumab + carboplatin + nab-paclitaxel (IMpower130)
records.sourceExcerptShort: In IMpower130 (EGFR/ALK wildtype), carboplatin-nab-paclitaxel plus atezolizumab improved OS versus chemotherapy.
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy; EGFR/ALK negative.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab + ipilimumab + 2 cycles chemotherapy (CheckMate 9LA)
records.sourceExcerptShort: Nivolumab-ipilimumab plus two cycles of ChT is a first-line option regardless of histology [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Second-line non-squamous: pemetrexed if not given in first line
records.sourceExcerptShort: Other options are pemetrexed if not given in first line [I, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Non-squamous histology; second-line after progression on first-line systemic therapy (including chemo-only if immunotherapy is contraindicated); use only if pemetrexed not previously used.

records.topicTitle: Second-line: nintedanib + docetaxel
records.sourceExcerptShort: Other options include nintedanib-docetaxel [II, B].
records.applicabilityNotes: Typically used in non-squamous disease as second-line after progression on first-line systemic therapy (including chemo-only if immunotherapy is contraindicated); ECOG PS 0-2.

records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab + carboplatin + (nab)-paclitaxel (KEYNOTE-407)
records.sourceExcerptShort: For squamous-cell carcinoma, first-line ChT+ICI options consist of pembrolizumab-carboplatin-(nab)-paclitaxel [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy; benefit preserved across PD-L1 strata.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab + ipilimumab + 2 cycles chemotherapy (CheckMate 9LA)
records.sourceExcerptShort: For squamous-cell carcinoma, first-line ChT+ICI options consist of nivolumab-ipilimumab plus two cycles of ChT [I, A].
records.applicabilityNotes: PS 0-1, no contraindication for immunotherapy.
